choices.text: Defense in depth: mechanical (padding, breakaway) + hardware (E-stops, redundant sensors) + firmware (joint limits, watchdog) + software (velocity limits, collision detection) + operational (workspace fencing). Each layer catches failures.

questions.explanation: Mechanical + hardware + firmware + software + ops layers.

choices.text: Linux PREEMPT_RT kernel + CPU isolation (isolcpus) + pre-allocated memory (no malloc in loop) + lock-free comms. Hard real-time guarantees deadline; control loops at 1kHz+ for industrial robots.
